summary: SuperAdmin Plan Editing feature fully tested - Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows verified. Edit Plans button, edit mode table, edit dialog, and save functionality all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns list with correct structure
Backend: PUT /api/subscriptions/plans/{plan_id} updates plan as SuperAdmin
Backend: PUT /api/subscriptions/plans/{plan_id} returns 403 for non-SuperAdmin (admin user)
Backend: PUT /api/subscriptions/plans/{plan_id} returns 404 for nonexistent plan
Backend: PUT /api/subscriptions/plans/{plan_id} supports partial field updates
Backend: User test@test.com has superadmin role
Backend: User admin@test.com has admin role (not superadmin)
Backend: All 4 plan names present (Free, Starter, Professional, Enterprise)
Backend: Free plan has zero prices
Backend: Enterprise plan has unlimited limits (999999)
Frontend: SuperAdmin sees 'Editar Planes (SuperAdmin)' button on Subscriptions page
Frontend: Edit mode button toggles to 'Modo Edición Activo'
Frontend: Edit mode shows table with all 4 plans
Frontend: Each plan row has edit button (data-testid='edit-plan-{name}')
Frontend: Edit dialog opens with all fields (name, description, prices, limits, features)
Frontend: Save button updates plan and shows success toast
Frontend: Changes persist after saving (verified by reopening dialog)
Frontend: Non-SuperAdmin (admin@test.com) does NOT see Edit Plans button
Frontend: Sidebar shows correct menu items for SuperAdmin (Suscripciones, Usuarios, Dashboard Admin)
critical_code_review_comments: Refactored components (ProductsTable, ProductFilters, SupplierCard) properly exported via index.js
sync.py normalize_product_data has expanded aliases for better column detection
Subscriptions.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: None (subscription plans already exist from previous iteration)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SuperAdmin plan editing feature fully functional. PUT /api/subscriptions/plans/{plan_id} endpoint protected by get_superadmin_user dependency. Frontend Subscriptions.jsx shows edit mode table with edit buttons for each plan. Dialog allows editing all fields including features. Toast notification confirms successful save. Refactored components: ProductsTable, ProductFilters, SupplierCard properly modularized.
